function createGenesisSeed(string prompt, string tone, bool evolves) external returns (uint256)
function spawnSeed(uint256 originSeedId, string mutation, string tone) external returns (uint256)
function bindSeedToRoom(uint256 roomId, uint256 seedId) external
function mutateSeed(uint256 seedId, string newPrompt, string reason) external
function getLineageDepth(uint256 seedId) external view returns (uint256)
function getLineage(uint256 seedId) external view returns (uint256[])
function getAncestors(uint256 seedId) external view returns (uint256[])
function seeds(uint256) external view returns (string prompt, string tone, bool evolves, uint256 originSeedId, uint256 spawnCount, uint256 timestamp, address creator, bool exists)
event SeedCreated(uint256 indexed seedId, string prompt, string tone, address creator)
event SeedSpawned(uint256 indexed originSeedId, uint256 indexed emergenceSeedId, string mutation)
event SeedBound(uint256 indexed roomId, uint256 indexed seedId)
event SeedMutated(uint256 indexed seedId, string newPrompt, string reason)
